heading: Working capital fund; availability for uniforms or allowances therefor
label: 1468 Working capital fund; availability for uniforms or allowances therefor
text: The working capital fund, established by , shall on and after be available for uniforms or allowances therefor, as authorized by .section 1467 of this titlesection 5901 of title 5June 13, 1956
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to the general revision and enactment of Title 5, Government Organization and Employees, by , , .section 503 of Title 5Pub. L. 89–554, § 180 Stat. 378Sept. 6, 1966
